name: Tirunallar Saniswaran Temple
tagline: Tirunallar Saniswaran Temple — spiritual town of Puducherry
shortDesc: Dharbaranyeswarar Temple, more popularly known as Tirunallar Saniswaran Temple, is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in the Thirunallar village of the Karaikal d
description: Dharbaranyeswarar Temple, more popularly known as Tirunallar Saniswaran Temple, is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in the Thirunallar village of the Karaikal district, in the Union territory of Puducherry, Southeastern India. The temple complex covers around 2 acres (0.81 ha) and entered through a five tiered gopuram, the main gateway. The temple has a number of shrines, with those of Shiva as Dharbaranyeswarar, his consort Praneswari Amman (Parvati), Shani (Saniswararan) and Somaskanda (a combined form of Shiva with Parvati and his son Murugan) being the most prominent. A

places.name: Keezhamanai
places.desc: Keezhamanai is a revenue village in Karaikal taluk, Karaikal district, Puducherry Union territory, India. It is one of several revenue villages within the Karaikal region.

places.name: Thirunallar
places.desc: Thirunallar is a small town in southeastern India in the Karaikal District of the Union Territory of Puducherry, near the town of Karaikal. The village is home to the Dharbaranyesvarar temple, dedicated to Shiva, which contains within it a shrine of Shani (Saturn).

places.name: Thirunallar taluk
places.desc: Thirunallar taluk is a taluk of Karaikal District, Puducherry, India. The taluk headquarters is located at Thirunallar.

places.name: Pettai, Karaikal
places.desc: Pettai is a panchayat village and revenue village in Pondicherry Union Territory, India. Administratively, Pettai is under the Thirunallar Taluk (formerly Thirunallar Commune Panchayat) of Karaikal District, Pondicherry Union Territory.

places.name: Thennankudy
places.desc: Thennankudy is a revenue village in the Thirunallar taluk of Karaikal District. It is situated to the west of Thirunallar.

places.name: Elyankudi
places.desc: Elyankudi is a revenue village in the Thirunallar taluk of Karaikal District in India. It is situated to the north-west of Thirunallar.

places.name: Sorakudy
places.desc: Sorakudy is a revenue village in the Thirunallar taluk of Karaikal District. It is situated to the south of Nedungadu and north-west of Thirunallar.

places.name: Vizhithiyur
places.desc: Vizhithiyur is a village in Puducherry, India. It is one of the three revenue villages in Neravy Taluk, Karaikal district.

name: Vadukeeswarar temple
tagline: Vadukeeswarar temple — spiritual town of Puducherry
shortDesc: Vadukeeswarar Temple (also called Thiruvandarkoil Temple, Thiruvandarkoil and Panchanadeeswarar temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Thiruvandarkoil ,
description: Vadukeeswarar Temple (also called Thiruvandarkoil Temple, Thiruvandarkoil and Panchanadeeswarar temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Thiruvandarkoil , a village in Pondicherry - Villupuram highway in Pondicherry in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Shiva is worshiped as Vadukeeswarar, and is represented by the lingam. His consort Parvati is depicted as Thiripura Sundari. The temple is located on the Chennai - Villupuram highway.

places.name: Varadharajaperumal temple, Thirubuvanai
places.desc: Varadaraja Perumal temple (also called Thirubuvanai Temple and Thodatri Perumal temple) in the South Indian union territory of Puducherry, is dedicated to the Hindu god Vishnu. It is located in Thirubuvanai, a village, located 23 km (14 mi), in the outskirts of Puducherry.

places.name: Thirubuvanai
places.desc: Thirubuvanai () is a village in the union territory of Puducherry, India. It is located in Mannadipet commune panchayat of the Villianur taluk.

places.name: Kandamangalam block
places.desc: The Kandamangalam block is a revenue block in the Viluppuram district of Tamil Nadu, India. It has a total of 45 panchayat villages.

places.name: Kandamangalam
places.desc: Kandamangalam (Tamil:கண்டமங்கலம்) is a town in Villupuram district, Villupuram taluk of Tamil Nadu. The town is one of the 13 panchayat unions in Villupuram district.

places.name: Kizhoor, Puducherry
places.desc: Kizhoor is a village situated in the Villianur Commune Panchayat, Puducherry. It is located around 22 kilometers away from Pondicherry.

places.name: Sooramangalam
places.desc: Sooramangalam is a panchayat village in Nettapakkam Commune in the Union Territory of Puducherry, India.

places.name: Earipakkam
places.desc: Earipakkam is a panchayat village in Nettapakkam Commune in the Union Territory of Puducherry, India. It is also a revenue village under Nettapakkam firka.

places.name: Kalmandapam
places.desc: Kalmandapam is a panchayat village in Nettapakkam Commune in the Union Territory of Puducherry, India.

name: Promenade Beach
tagline: Promenade Beach — beach town of Puducherry
shortDesc: Rock Beach (or, known as, "Promenade Beach", French: Plage de la Promenade) is the popular stretch of beachfront in the city of Puducherry, India, along the Bay of Bengal.
description: Rock Beach (or, known as, "Promenade Beach", French: Plage de la Promenade) is the popular stretch of beachfront in the city of Puducherry, India, along the Bay of Bengal. It is a 1.2-kilometre-long stretch in Pondicherry, starts from War Memorial and end at Dupleix Park on the Goubert Avenue.

places.name: French War Memorial (Puducherry)
places.desc: The French War Memorial in Puducherry, India (French: Monument aux Combattants des Indes Françaises morts pour la Patrie) is a war memorial dedicated to residents of French India who died for the country during the First World War. It is on Goubert Avenue in Puducherry, located opposite to the Gandhi statue.

places.name: Puducherry taluk
places.desc: Puducherry taluk (Tamil: [puðutːʃeːɾi]) is one of four taluks in the Puducherry district of the union territory of Puducherry. It comprises the city of Pondicherry and villages of Ariyankuppam Commune.

places.name: Aayi Mandapam
places.desc: Aayi Mandapam, also known as Park Monument (French: Monument du Parc), is a white monument in Pondicherry, India, built during the time of Napoleon III, Emperor of France. It is situated in the center of Bharati Park.

places.name: Siege of Pondicherry (1778)
places.desc: The siege of Pondicherry was the first military action on the Indian subcontinent following the declaration of war between Great Britain and France in the American Revolutionary War. A British force besieged the French Indian port of Pondicherry in August 1778, which capitulated after ten weeks of siege.

places.name: Battle of Pondicherry
places.desc: The Battle of Pondicherry was a naval battle between a British squadron under Vice-Admiral George Pocock and French squadron under Comte d'Aché on 10 September 1759 off the Carnatic coast of India near Pondicherry during the Seven Years' War. Pocock attempted to intercept d'Aché, whose squadron was carrying reinforcements and money for the French forces in Pondicherry.

places.name: Lok Niwas, Pondicherry
places.desc: Lok Niwas, formerly Raj Niwas (translation: Government House) is the official residence of the Lieutenant Governor of Puducherry. It is located in Puducherry's capital city of Pondicherry.

places.name: Our Lady of Angels Church, Puducherry
places.desc: Our Lady of Angels Church (also called Église Notre-Dame des Anges, White Chapel, Kaps Koil) is the fourth oldest church in Puducherry, a Union territory in South India. The original structure was built in Greco Roman architecture by Napoleon III in 1855, with the architect being Louis Guerre.

places.name: Fort Louis (Pondicherry)
places.desc: Fort Louis or Fort Saint Louis was a French fort that stood in Pondicherry on the eastern coast of India. The fort was built around 1701 by François Martin and completed posthumously around 1706.

name: Our Lady of Lourdes Shrine
tagline: Our Lady of Lourdes Shrine — spiritual town of Puducherry
shortDesc: Shrine of Our Lady of Lourdes, Villianur, Puducherry (French: Sanctuaire Notre-Dame de Lourdes) is a Catholic Marian shrine and a parish church in Villianur, Puducherry, India.
description: Shrine of Our Lady of Lourdes, Villianur, Puducherry (French: Sanctuaire Notre-Dame de Lourdes) is a Catholic Marian shrine and a parish church in Villianur, Puducherry, India. The shrine is dedicated to the Blessed Virgin Mary under the title of Our Lady of Lourdes. Pope Leo XIII issued a pontifical decree of coronation on 21 February 1886 towards the venerated Marian statue and declared the site an official Marian shrine. The former Archbishop of Pondicherry, François-Jean-Marie Laouënan executed the rite of coronation on 8 May 1886.

places.name: Villianur
places.desc: Villianur or Villianoor, Villenour in French, is a commune panchayat and the headquarters of the Villianur taluk of Puducherry District. Our Lady of Lourdes Shrine and Kameeswarar temple are two major landmarks in the town.

places.name: Villianur taluk
places.desc: Villianur taluk (Tamil: [ʋilːijnuːɾ]) is one of four taluks in the Pondicherry District of the union territory of Puducherry. It comprises villages under Villianur and Mannadipet Commune.

places.name: Villianur commune
places.desc: Villianur is one of 5 Communes in Pondicherry district in the Indian territory of Puducherry. Villianur Commune comes under Villianur Taluk Of Puducherry District.

places.name: Villianur firka
places.desc: Villianur is one of the 4 Firkas of Villianur taluk in Pondicherry (North) Revenue Sub-division of the Indian union territory of Puducherry.

places.name: Kameeswarar temple
places.desc: Thirukameeswarar Temple (also called Kokilamba - Kameeswarar temple or Villianur Temple or kameeswarar temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Villianur, a town in the South Indian union territory of Puducherry. Shiva is worshiped as Kameeswarar, and is represented by the lingam.

places.name: Kurumbapet
places.desc: Kurumbapet is a town and a gram panchayat in Pondicherry district in the Indian union territory of Puducherry.

places.name: Uzhavarkarai
places.desc: Uzhavarkarai (Tamil: [uɻɐʋɐɾhɐɾɐi̯]) is a city, a municipality and a taluk in Puducherry district in the union territory of Puducherry. The enclaves of Kalapet and Alankuppam are parts of Uzhavarkarai municipality.

places.name: Mangalam, Puducherry
places.desc: Mangalam is a panchayat village in Villianur Commune in the Union Territory of Puducherry, India.

name: Karaikal Ammayar Temple
tagline: Karaikal Ammayar Temple — spiritual town of Puducherry
shortDesc: Karaikal Ammaiyar Temple (French : Pagode Somanadassamy or Pagode Karikal Amméar) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the Shaivite saint or Nayanmar Punithavathi, more famously known as
description: Karaikal Ammaiyar Temple (French : Pagode Somanadassamy or Pagode Karikal Amméar) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the Shaivite saint or Nayanmar Punithavathi, more famously known as Karaikal Ammaiyar (transl. The revered mother of Karaikal). It is located on Bharathiar Street (Formerly the Rue de Poréar, or Poraiyar Street), in the center of Karaikal city, in India.

places.name: Kailasanathar Temple, Karaikal
places.desc: Kailasanathar Temple (French : Pagode Caïlachanadar) is a Shaivite temple located in the downtown of Karaikal, India. It is among the prominent Hindu temples of the city, situated opposite to the famed Karaikal Ammaiyar Temple.

places.name: Nithyakalyana Perumal Temple, Karaikal
places.desc: Nithyakalyana Perumal Temple is one of three famous temples in the port city of Karaikal, Puducherry, India. It is nearby the Karaikal Ammayar Temple.

places.name: Aayiram Kaliamman Temple
places.desc: Aayiram Kaliamman Temple is an ancient temple in Tirumalairayanpattinam (T.R.Pattinam). The temple is much famous for the main deity, Goddess Kaliamman's statue is made up of wood.

places.name: Our Lady of Angels Church, Karaikal
places.desc: Our Lady of Angels Church (also called Karaikal Church) is the oldest church in Karaikal in the Union territory of Pondicherry, in Southern India. The current structure was built in Neo-Gothic architecture by the French Colonial Empire in 1822.

places.name: Karaikal
places.desc: Karaikal (, Tamil: [kaːɾɐi̯kːaːl], French: Karikal [kaʁikal]) is a port city of the Indian Union Territory of Puducherry. It is the administrative headquarters of the Karaikal District and the second most populated town in the Union Territory after Pondicherry.

places.name: Karaikal taluk
places.desc: Karaikal taluk is a taluk of Karaikal District of Puducherry, India. It consists of one municipality, Karaikal and the following revenue villages: Poovam Thiruvettakudy Varichikudy Kil Vanjiyur Mel Vanjiyur Keezhaiyur Polagam Apart from the above revenue villages, Karaikal taluk includes the following commune panchayats.

places.name: Karaikal Municipality
places.desc: Karaikal Municipality is a municipality in the union territory Puducherry, India. It serves the area covered by the town of Karaikal, located in Karaikal taluk of Karaikal district.

places.name: Dano-Carical Conflict
places.desc: The Dano-Carical Conflict (Danish: Konflikten mod Carical) was a small-scale conflict between the Danes at Tranquebar and the Portuguese at Carical (Karaikal). The conflict includes three smaller naval engagements, which eventually led to a four-hour-long imprisonment of Danish Captain Simon Jansen.

name: Oussudu Bird Sanctuary
tagline: Oussudu Bird Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Puducherry
shortDesc: Oussudu or Ousteri Bird Sanctuary (French: Réserve Ornithologique d'Oussudu) is the first and the only wildlife sanctuary in the Indian union territory of Puducherry.
description: Oussudu or Ousteri Bird Sanctuary (French: Réserve Ornithologique d'Oussudu) is the first and the only wildlife sanctuary in the Indian union territory of Puducherry. It was created in 2008. It spans over 390 acres around the Ousteri lake.

places.name: Ousteri Lake
places.desc: Ousteri Lake (French: Lac Oustéri) is a lake shared between the union territory of Puducherry, and the state of Tamil Nadu. The spatial extend of the lake is almost equal in between the two states, and it is one of the largest tanks in the Puducherry region.

places.name: Thondamanatham firka
places.desc: Thondamanatham is one of the 4 Firkas of Villianur taluk in Pondicherry (North) Revenue Sub-division of the Indian union territory of Puducherry.

places.name: Kurumbapet
places.desc: Kurumbapet is a town and a gram panchayat in Pondicherry district in the Indian union territory of Puducherry.

places.name: Dharmapuri (Puducherry)
places.desc: Dharmapuri is a ward in Oulgaret Municipality of Pondicherry district in the Indian union territory of Puducherry.

places.name: Kameeswarar temple
places.desc: Thirukameeswarar Temple (also called Kokilamba - Kameeswarar temple or Villianur Temple or kameeswarar temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Villianur, a town in the South Indian union territory of Puducherry. Shiva is worshiped as Kameeswarar, and is represented by the lingam.

places.name: Villianur taluk
places.desc: Villianur taluk (Tamil: [ʋilːijnuːɾ]) is one of four taluks in the Pondicherry District of the union territory of Puducherry. It comprises villages under Villianur and Mannadipet Commune.
